gitCommit.subject: fix(ts): TS2739 CartsListPage — EmptyState icon→variant + action JSX→children
gitCommit.body:
fix(ts): TS2739 CartsListPage — EmptyState icon→variant + action JSX→children

Lovable commit 917aef4 introduced 2 violations in CartsListPage.tsx:

1. icon={ShoppingCart} — EmptyStateProps has no 'icon' prop.
   Fix: variant="cart" (pre-existing variant that renders ShoppingCart).

2. action={<Button>} — EmptyState.action expects
   { label: string; onClick: () => void }, not ReactNode.
   TS2739: Element is missing 'label' and 'onClick' properties.
   Fix: move Button to children (rendered in mt-6 animate-fade-in div).
   Preserves disabled={!canCreateCart} which the action object cannot express.

Also removes unused ShoppingCart from lucide-react import.
